_comment: Curated, human-verified general-knowledge trivia. The guaranteed fallback when the AI custom-topic path can't produce a question (niche topic the verifier won't confirm, daily cap hit, no API key, or an API hiccup). EVERY fact here must be true and single-answer — these launch with NO verify pass, so accuracy is non-negotiable. Lean surprising/'oh neat' over rote.
